name: Cats Visiting Cozy Art Studios
short_description: Explore cozy art studios and uncover hidden cats in this charming seek-and-find adventure. Search through beautifully illustrated creative spaces, click to collect every feline, and complete each level. Can you find them all?
detailed_description:
Step into the warmth of Cats Visiting Cozy Art Studios, a relaxing hidden object game where creativity and curiosity collide. Explore intricately designed art studios, filled with paints, canvases, and sculptures, as you search for cleverly hidden cats. With every click, uncover playful felines tucked away in charming artistic spaces.

Featuring multiple levels with beautifully detailed illustrations, Cats Visiting Cozy Art Studios offers a soothing and engaging experience for players of all ages. Test your observation skills, enjoy the tranquil ambiance, and see if you can find every cat hiding among the masterpieces. Will you discover them all?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
